branding._comment_branding: Per-deployment branding. siteName/logo/favicon accept absolute URLs (CDN ok). logo = header logo; home.logo = hero logo (separate).
branding._comment_navLinks: Extra header links (JSON array). Link = { label, url, icon }. Dropdown/toggle = { label, icon, children: [ { label, url, icon } ] }. Example: [ { "label": "Map", "url": "https://example.com/map", "icon": "fas fa-map-marker-alt" }, { "label": "Pools", "icon": "fas fa-coins", "children": [ { "label": "KOTO", "url": "https://koto.example.com" }, { "label": "MONA", "url": "https://mona.example.com" } ] } ]
branding._comment_showTabStats: Show the 'Tab Stats' nav entry + /tbs page (a per-pool comparison table). Omit for auto (shown only when more than one pool is configured; hidden for a single coin). Set true/false to force.

home._comment_title: Free-form hero heading (multi-coin). Leave empty to use the {{coin}} template below.
home._comment_highlights: Hero badges. Omit for defaults (No KYC / Anonymous Mining / No Registration); set [] to hide; or override: [ "Instant Payout", { "icon": "fas fa-bolt", "text": "Fast Payout" } ].
home._comment_sections:
Custom HTML blocks under the hero. Example: [ { "title": "Mining Settings", "html": "
  • stratum+tcp://stratum.example.com:3333 (diff 0.1)
  • Username: <your-address>.<worker>, Password: x
" } ]
home._comment_servers: Server cards with live ping. flag = ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 (flag-icons). pingUrl must be CORS-enabled (latency measured in-browser). features: string, or { "icon": "fas fa-shield-alt", "text": "DDoS Protected" }.

branding._comment_analytics: GA4: set googleAnalyticsId to a G-XXXXXXXXXX id. Custom tags via scripts: [ { "src": "https://plausible.io/js/script.js", "defer": true, "attributes": { "data-domain": "example.com" } } ]
